items.title: OpenAI acquires TBPN
items.content: OpenAI acquires TBPN to accelerate global conversations around AI and support independent media, expanding dialogue with builders, businesses, and the broader tech community.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI acquires TBPN to accelerate global conversations around AI and support independent media, expanding dialogue with builders, businesses, and the broader tech community.

items.title: Codex now offers more flexible pricing for teams
items.content: Codex now includes pay-as-you-go pricing for ChatGPT Business and Enterprise, providing teams a more flexible option to start and scale adoption.
items.contentSnippet: Codex now includes pay-as-you-go pricing for ChatGPT Business and Enterprise, providing teams a more flexible option to start and scale adoption.
items.summary: Codex现提供ChatGPT Business和Enterprise的按需付费方案，为团队提供更灵活的采用和扩展选项。

items.title: Gradient Labs gives every bank customer an AI account manager
items.content: Gradient Labs uses GPT-4.1 and GPT-5.4 mini and nano to power AI agents that automate banking support workflows with low latency and high reliability.
items.contentSnippet: Gradient Labs uses GPT-4.1 and GPT-5.4 mini and nano to power AI agents that automate banking support workflows with low latency and high reliability.

items.title: Accelerating the next phase of AI
items.content: OpenAI raises $122 billion in new funding to expand frontier AI globally, invest in next-generation compute, and meet growing demand for ChatGPT, Codex, and enterprise AI.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI raises $122 billion in new funding to expand frontier AI globally, invest in next-generation compute, and meet growing demand for ChatGPT, Codex, and enterprise AI.
items.summary: OpenAI获得122亿美元新融资，用于全球扩展前沿AI、投资下一代计算，并满足ChatGPT、Codex及企业AI日益增长的需求。

items.title: Helping disaster response teams turn AI into action across Asia
items.content: AI for Disaster Response in Asia: OpenAI Workshop with Gates Foundation
items.contentSnippet: AI for Disaster Response in Asia: OpenAI Workshop with Gates Foundation
items.summary: OpenAI与盖茨基金会合作，在亚洲举办研讨会，旨在帮助灾害响应团队将人工智能技术转化为实际行动，提升亚洲地区的灾害应对能力。

items.title: STADLER reshapes knowledge work at a 230-year-old company
items.content: Learn how STADLER uses ChatGPT to transform knowledge work, saving time and accelerating productivity across 650 employees.
items.contentSnippet: Learn how STADLER uses ChatGPT to transform knowledge work, saving time and accelerating productivity across 650 employees.

items.title: Inside our approach to the Model Spec
items.content: Learn how OpenAI’s Model Spec serves as a public framework for model behavior, balancing safety, user freedom, and accountability as AI systems advance.
items.contentSnippet: Learn how OpenAI’s Model Spec serves as a public framework for model behavior, balancing safety, user freedom, and accountability as AI systems advance.
items.summary: OpenAI的模型规范（Model Spec）作为公开框架，旨在规范模型行为，平衡安全、用户自由与责任。该规范随着AI系统的发展，确保其安全性、可控性和可追溯性，为AI技术的进步提供标准。

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Safety Bug Bounty program
items.content: OpenAI launches a Safety Bug Bounty program to identify AI abuse and safety risks, including agentic vulnerabilities, prompt injection, and data exfiltration.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI launches a Safety Bug Bounty program to identify AI abuse and safety risks, including agentic vulnerabilities, prompt injection, and data exfiltration.
items.summary: OpenAI推出安全漏洞悬赏计划，旨在识别AI滥用和安全风险，涵盖代理漏洞、提示注入和数据泄露等问题。该计划通过奖励机制鼓励研究人员发现并报告潜在威胁，以提升AI系统的整体安全性。

items.title: Helping developers build safer AI experiences for teens
items.content: OpenAI releases prompt-based teen safety policies for developers using gpt-oss-safeguard, helping moderate age-specific risks in AI systems.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI releases prompt-based teen safety policies for developers using gpt-oss-safeguard, helping moderate age-specific risks in AI systems.
items.summary: OpenAI发布基于提示的青少年安全政策，供使用gpt-oss-safeguard的开发者参考，以帮助构建更安全的青少年AI体验，并规范AI系统中针对特定年龄的风险。

items.title: Powering product discovery in ChatGPT
items.content: ChatGPT introduces richer, visually immersive shopping powered by the Agentic Commerce Protocol, enabling product discovery, side-by-side comparisons, and merchant integration.
items.contentSnippet: ChatGPT introduces richer, visually immersive shopping powered by the Agentic Commerce Protocol, enabling product discovery, side-by-side comparisons, and merchant integration.
items.summary: ChatGPT通过代理式商务协议（Agentic Commerce Protocol）引入更丰富的视觉沉浸式购物体验，支持产品发现、对比和商家集成，提升了购物效率。

items.title: Update on the OpenAI Foundation
items.content: The OpenAI Foundation announces plans to invest at least $1 billion in curing diseases, economic opportunity, AI resilience, and community programs.
items.contentSnippet: The OpenAI Foundation announces plans to invest at least $1 billion in curing diseases, economic opportunity, AI resilience, and community programs.
items.summary: OpenAI基金会宣布计划投资至少10亿美元，用于治疗疾病、经济机会、AI韧性及社区项目。此举旨在推动相关领域发展，提升社会福祉与科技应用水平。

items.title: Creating with Sora Safely
items.content: To address the novel safety challenges posed by a state-of-the-art video model as well as a new social creation platform, we’ve built Sora 2 and the Sora app with safety at the foundation. Our approach is anchored in concrete protections.
items.contentSnippet: To address the novel safety challenges posed by a state-of-the-art video model as well as a new social creation platform, we’ve built Sora 2 and the Sora app with safety at the foundation. Our approach is anchored in concrete protections.
items.summary: 为应对先进视频模型和新型社交创作平台带来的新安全挑战，我们以安全为基础，开发了Sora 2和Sora应用。我们的方法基于具体保护措施，确保内容创作过程的安全可控。

items.title: How we monitor internal coding agents for misalignment
items.content: How OpenAI uses chain-of-thought monitoring to study misalignment in internal coding agents—analyzing real-world deployments to detect risks and strengthen AI safety safeguards.
items.contentSnippet: How OpenAI uses chain-of-thought monitoring to study misalignment in internal coding agents—analyzing real-world deployments to detect risks and strengthen AI safety safeguards.
items.summary: OpenAI采用思维链监控方法，研究内部编码代理中的错位问题。通过分析实际部署情况，检测风险并强化AI安全防护措施。

items.title: OpenAI to acquire Astral
items.content: Accelerates Codex growth to power the next generation of Python developer tools
items.contentSnippet: Accelerates Codex growth to power the next generation of Python developer tools
items.summary: OpenAI计划收购Astral公司，此举旨在加速Codex平台的发展，以推动下一代Python开发者工具的进步。通过整合Astral的技术，OpenAI将提升其开发工具的竞争力，为Python开发者提供更强大的支持。

items.title: OpenAI Japan announces Japan Teen Safety Blueprint to put teen safety first
items.content: OpenAI Japan announces the Japan Teen Safety Blueprint, introducing stronger age protections, parental controls, and well-being safeguards for teens using generative AI.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI Japan announces the Japan Teen Safety Blueprint, introducing stronger age protections, parental controls, and well-being safeguards for teens using generative AI.
items.summary: OpenAI Japan发布日本青少年安全蓝图，旨在将青少年安全放在首位。该蓝图引入了更严格的年龄保护措施、家长控制功能以及针对使用生成式AI的青少年身心健康保障。

items.title: Introducing GPT-5.4 mini and nano
items.content: GPT-5.4 mini and nano are smaller, faster versions of GPT-5.4 optimized for coding, tool use, multimodal reasoning, and high-volume API and sub-agent workloads.
items.contentSnippet: GPT-5.4 mini and nano are smaller, faster versions of GPT-5.4 optimized for coding, tool use, multimodal reasoning, and high-volume API and sub-agent workloads.
items.summary: GPT-5.4 mini和nano是GPT-5.4的精简版，专为编程、工具使用、多模态推理设计，并优化了高容量API和子代理工作负载。

items.title: Equipping workers with insights about compensation
items.content: New research shows Americans send nearly 3 million daily messages to ChatGPT asking about compensation and earnings, helping close the wage information gap.
items.contentSnippet: New research shows Americans send nearly 3 million daily messages to ChatGPT asking about compensation and earnings, helping close the wage information gap.

items.title: Why Codex Security Doesn’t Include a SAST Report
items.content: A deep dive into why Codex Security doesn’t rely on traditional SAST, instead using AI-driven constraint reasoning and validation to find real vulnerabilities with fewer false positives.
items.contentSnippet: A deep dive into why Codex Security doesn’t rely on traditional SAST, instead using AI-driven constraint reasoning and validation to find real vulnerabilities with fewer false positives.
items.summary: Codex Security不依赖传统SAST，而是采用AI驱动的约束推理和验证技术。这种方法能更准确地发现真实漏洞，同时减少误报。

items.title: Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex
items.content: Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%, automating CI/CD reviews, and delivering full-stack builds in weeks.
items.contentSnippet: Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%, automating CI/CD reviews, and delivering full-stack builds in weeks.
items.summary: Rakuten采用OpenAI的Codex编程代理，通过自动化CI/CD审查和全栈构建，将软件交付速度提升50%，并显著缩短了平均修复时间。这一技术使Rakuten能够更快、更安全地推出软件，将完整栈构建时间缩短至数周。

items.title: Designing AI agents to resist prompt injection
items.content: How ChatGPT defends against prompt injection and social engineering by constraining risky actions and protecting sensitive data in agent workflows.
items.contentSnippet: How ChatGPT defends against prompt injection and social engineering by constraining risky actions and protecting sensitive data in agent workflows.
items.summary: 文章探讨了如何通过约束风险行为和保护敏感数据来设计AI代理以抵抗提示注入和社会工程。ChatGPT通过限制代理工作流程中的高风险操作，并保护敏感信息，有效防御提示注入和社会工程攻击。

items.title: From model to agent: Equipping the Responses API with a computer environment
items.content: How OpenAI built an agent runtime using the Responses API, shell tool, and hosted containers to run secure, scalable agents with files, tools, and state.
items.contentSnippet: How OpenAI built an agent runtime using the Responses API, shell tool, and hosted containers to run secure, scalable agents with files, tools, and state.
items.summary: OpenAI利用Responses API、shell工具和托管容器构建了一个智能体运行时，以实现具有文件、工具和状态的、安全且可扩展的智能体。

items.title: Wayfair boosts catalog accuracy and support speed with OpenAI
items.content: Wayfair uses OpenAI models to improve ecommerce support and product catalog accuracy, automating ticket triage and enhancing millions of product attributes at scale.
items.contentSnippet: Wayfair uses OpenAI models to improve ecommerce support and product catalog accuracy, automating ticket triage and enhancing millions of product attributes at scale.

items.title: Improving instruction hierarchy in frontier LLMs
items.content: IH-Challenge trains models to prioritize trusted instructions, improving instruction hierarchy, safety steerability, and resistance to prompt injection attacks.
items.contentSnippet: IH-Challenge trains models to prioritize trusted instructions, improving instruction hierarchy, safety steerability, and resistance to prompt injection attacks.
items.summary:
标题：改进前沿大模型的指令层级

摘要：IH-Challenge通过训练模型优先处理可信指令，提升了指令层级、安全引导能力及抗提示注入攻击的韧性。

items.title: New ways to learn math and science in ChatGPT
items.content: ChatGPT introduces interactive visual explanations for math and science, helping students explore formulas, variables, and concepts in real time.
items.contentSnippet: ChatGPT introduces interactive visual explanations for math and science, helping students explore formulas, variables, and concepts in real time.

items.title: OpenAI to acquire Promptfoo
items.content: OpenAI is acquiring Promptfoo, an AI security platform that helps enterprises identify and remediate vulnerabilities in AI systems during development.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI is acquiring Promptfoo, an AI security platform that helps enterprises identify and remediate vulnerabilities in AI systems during development.
items.summary: OpenAI宣布收购AI安全平台Promptfoo。该平台帮助企业识别和修复AI系统开发过程中的漏洞，以提升AI系统的安全性。此次收购旨在加强OpenAI在AI安全领域的布局。

items.title: Codex Security: now in research preview
items.content: Codex Security is an AI application security agent that analyzes project context to detect, validate, and patch complex vulnerabilities with higher confidence and less noise.
items.contentSnippet: Codex Security is an AI application security agent that analyzes project context to detect, validate, and patch complex vulnerabilities with higher confidence and less noise.

items.title: How Balyasny Asset Management built an AI research engine for investing
items.content: See how Balyasny built an AI research system with GPT-5.4, rigorous model evaluation, and agent workflows to transform investment analysis at scale.
items.contentSnippet: See how Balyasny built an AI research system with GPT-5.4, rigorous model evaluation, and agent workflows to transform investment analysis at scale.
items.summary: 巴莱斯基资产管理公司利用GPT-5.4、严格模型评估和智能体工作流程，构建了AI研究系统，以规模化重塑投资分析。该系统通过先进技术提升分析效率，推动投资决策智能化发展。

items.title: How Descript engineers multilingual video dubbing at scale
items.content: Using OpenAI reasoning models, Descript unlocked automatic localization of large content libraries without losing timing or meaning.
items.contentSnippet: Using OpenAI reasoning models, Descript unlocked automatic localization of large content libraries without losing timing or meaning.
items.summary: Descript利用OpenAI推理模型实现了大规模多语言视频配音的自动化，确保了配音的精准性和完整性。

items.title: Introducing GPT-5.4
items.content: Introducing GPT-5.4, OpenAI’s most most capable and efficient frontier model for professional work, with state-of-the-art coding, computer use, tool search, and 1M-token context.
items.contentSnippet: Introducing GPT-5.4, OpenAI’s most most capable and efficient frontier model for professional work, with state-of-the-art coding, computer use, tool search, and 1M-token context.

items.title: GPT-5.4 Thinking System Card
items.summary:
文章标题：GPT-5.4 思维系统卡

摘要：GPT-5.4思维系统卡是一份针对GPT-5.4模型的思维工具，旨在帮助用户更高效地利用该模型进行信息处理和决策支持。该系统卡通过提供一系列预设的思考框架和操作指南，简化了用户与模型的交互过程，提升了使用体验。
